arts.ttl: The ONE Man Utd academy star Ruben Amorim rates as Obi-Martin judgement passed
arts.sum: The ONE Man Utd academy star Ruben Amorim rates as Obi-Martin judgement passed Although Kukonki is reportedly the only academy player that Amorim rates extremely highly, the Portuguese tactician has hinted that Chido Obi-Martin could become a first-team player in the future.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Leicester City live early team news plus how to watch and kick-off time
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, George Smith)
arts.sum: Live updates from Old Trafford as Man United host Leicester City in the fourth round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Man Utd star tipped to retire despite making eight appearances under Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Christian Eriksen is out of contract this summer and expected to leave Manchester United with his fellow Dane fearful that the playmaker may end up retiring - rather than finding a new club

arts.ttl: Manchester United v Leicester LIVE: Team news and line-ups as Amorim considers Dorgu and Heaven debuts
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim’s Man Utd are struggling in the league and need a boost as they take on Ruud van Nistelrooy’s Leicester City in the fourth round of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Unai Emery gives honest assessment of Marcus Rashford's first week at Aston Villa as he admits getting Man United loanee back to his best is a 'huge challenge'
arts.sum: Rashford has joined Villa on loan from Manchester United for the remainder of the season and hopes to make his debut in Sunday's FA Cup last-16 tie against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: ‘Keep an eye’: Liverpool & Man United told they can sign Jamie Gittens if one thing happens
arts.sum: It’s difficult to imagine Liverpool looking to add yet another left winger to their ranks in the next transfer window. Yet, reports indicated that the Reds have been impressed with what they’ve seen from Jamie Gittens at Borussia Dortmund this term. Who can blame them given that the Englishman has already plundered seven goals and […] The post ‘Keep an eye’: Liverpool & Man United told they can sign Jamie Gittens if one thing happens appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils, Chelsea 'in 10-club battle' for £9m Thierry Henry favourite
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea are reportedly involved in a heated transfer battle for Crystal Palace marksman Jean-Philippe Mateta ahead of the summer window.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's Man Utd boardroom win says a lot as Marcus Rashford 'surprises' club
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's successful cold-shouldering of the now-departed Marcus Rashford at Manchester United indicates the Red Devils board's faith in him.

arts.ttl: Ogden vs. Marcotti: How much work does Ruben Amorim still need to do at Man United?
arts.sum: Man United ended the January transfer window solving some issues (goodbye, Rashford) but not fixing others. How much more does this team need to contend again?

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel wants Man Utd transfer after NIGHTMARE Spurs debut
arts.sum: Mathys Tel is reportedly eager to join Manchester United this summer, despite his Deadline Day loan move to Tottenham Hotspur. Following Spurs’ 4-0 defeat to Liverpool at Anfield, Ange Postecoglou was eager to praise both Kevin Danso and Tel for their debut performances, despite the result.
